Reason_EN: Lacks Phosphorus needed for strong root development.
Reason_SW: Haina Fosforasi inayohitajika kwa ukuzaji wa mizizi.

Reason_EN: Lacks sufficient Nitrogen for vegetative growth later.
Reason_SW: Haina Nitrojeni ya kutosha kwa ukuaji wa baadaye.

Reason_EN: Nutrient density is too low for commercial yields.
Reason_SW: Uzito wa virutubisho ni mdogo sana kwa mavuno ya kibiashara.

Reason_EN: Generic blend. Ratio may not match your exact soil deficit.
Reason_SW: Mchanganyiko wa jumla. Uwiano unaweza usilingane na upungufu wako wa udongo.

Reason_EN: Soil is optimal; current fertilizer is unnecessary.
Reason_SW: Udongo uko sawa; mbolea ya sasa haihitajiki.
